title: glyceria obtusa
intro: Glyceria obtusa, also known as fringeleaf mannagrass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Glyceria obtusa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Glyceria obtusa can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it has been used in herbal remedies to promote digestive health and reduce inflammation.
